final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow, announcing GPT-5.5 launch, with Sam Altman as the presenter.

Style/medium: needs a "国内融资路演" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 中关村/张江高科 科技路演 deck visual tradition, 头部美元基金 LP presentation design language, 2020s 硬科技独角兽 IPO prospectus cover aesthetics; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single wide-format slide cover layout, with title area dominant, presenter credit bottom-anchored
Subject: must include GPT-5.5 launch announcement as the primary headline subject, Sam Altman as named presenter
Scene/backdrop: needs a high-tech, forward-looking backdrop atmosphere — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, institutional, GP-caliber gravitas mood — exact lighting is yours
Color palette: needs a palette that balances international tech authority with China domestic roadshow convention — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (primary headline), "奥特曼" (presenter name)
Constraints: must conform to China domestic roadshow slide cover conventions; must feel appropriate for GP / institutional investor audience
Avoid: overly casual or consumer-app aesthetics; cluttered layout
